name: Ninja Blast
short_description: Independent action game that features an action game mode and a stealth game mode, with strong narrative and graphic violence. Completely remade and improved in 2024 at no additional cost.
detailed_description:
Ninja Blast is an action-adventure game with stealth elements.

The story unfolds in Nilbehaim, which became known as the nation of the Ninjas, but is invaded by a tyrannical empire with a thirst for power led by a man named Fireon. After the invasion of the empire, two young ninjas emerge, Shiru and Yanabi, with the hope of annihilating Fireon's army and reclaiming their country and everything that is rightfully theirs.

Play as Shiru or Yanabi during a journey of fighting for freedom in this fast-paced, action-packed game with several boss fights and powerful enemies. Evolve your skills with the level system and become a powerful ninja capable of transforming your story.

The new version released in 2024 brings a new look and major changes to the game, improving every aspect at no additional cost.

supported_languages:
English, Portuguese - Brazil*, Japanese*
*languages with full audio support
